title: SuperYosh's PVP Client
body:
IMPORTANT: IT IS HIGHY RECCOMENDED THAT YOU INSTALL OPTIFINE ALONG WITH THIS MODPACK. IGNORING THIS MESSAGE WILL LIKELY RESULT IN POOR PREFORMANCE AND AN OVERALL POOR EXPERIENCE. THIS MODPACK HAS ONLY BEEN TESTED WITH OPTIFINE INSTALLED.

OptiFine Download Link: http://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar&x=b7c6

The ultimate 1.8.9 PVP Experience. Making use of PolyFrost's amazing mods, the Essential mod, and more, this modpack has everything you need to pwn noobs. With performace improvements, custom texture packs, and a pleathora of amazing mods, this is the best PVP modpack you'll ever come accross. Look in the gallery for screenshots.
